content.hint: 当主持人总结并结束会议时，常用短语表达感谢并认可其总结。

options: Let's do this again next week!

content.situation: 会议主持人总结了各项任务后，准备结束会议，你希望表达感谢并确认会跟进自己的任务。
content.speakerText: Alright, to summarize: Sarah will draft the client proposal, Mark will update the budget tracker, and everyone should review the slides before Friday.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，总结一下：Sarah起草客户提案，Mark更新预算追踪表，大家在周五前审阅幻灯片。
content.knowledgePoint: 会议结束时的礼貌回应与总结确认
content.responseTemplate: Got it—I'll make sure to review the slides by Friday. ___

content.hint: 职场中表示'今天下班前'的常用缩写
content.template: To wrap up: Alex will send the report by ___ , Sam will follow up with IT, and we meet again next Tuesday at 10.
content.knowledgePoint: 职场缩略语（EOD = End of Day）
